title: Target
description: A call target for the 'dial' verb. Specifies who or what to connect the call to: a phone number (PSTN), a SIP endpoint, a registered user, or a Microsoft Teams user.

type.description: The type of target to dial.

number.description: The phone number to dial. Required when type is 'phone'. Use E.164 format.

sipUri.description: The SIP URI to dial. Required when type is 'sip'.

name.description: The registered user name to dial. Required when type is 'user'. Also used as the display name for SIP targets.

tenant.description: The Microsoft Teams tenant ID. Required when type is 'teams'.

trunk.description: The SIP trunk to use for the outbound call. When specified, overrides the default carrier routing.

confirmHook.description: A webhook to invoke when the target answers, before connecting the call. Use this to screen calls, play a whisper prompt, or require the target to press a key to accept.

method.description: The HTTP method to use when invoking the confirmHook.

headers.description: Custom SIP headers to include on the outbound INVITE. Keys are header names, values are header values.

from.description: Override the From header on the outbound SIP INVITE.

user.description: The user part of the SIP From URI.

host.description: The host part of the SIP From URI.

auth.description: SIP authentication credentials for the outbound call, if the far end requires digest auth.

vmail.description: If true, follow the call into voicemail if the target does not answer.

overrideTo.description: Override the Request-URI on the outbound SIP INVITE. Useful when the Request-URI needs to differ from the To header.

proxy.description: A SIP proxy to route the outbound call through, specified as a SIP URI.
